pageContext.name: Heroes
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Clampett Studio Collections are thrilled to bring you the beautifully bold Heroes Fine Art Print!  Taken from the renowned series Batman: Hush, which premiered in 2001, Heroes is one of the two triple-gatefold comic book covers for Batman #619; the final edition of the Hush series. This final edition was published in November 2003. Rendered by Jim Lee, Lee's style is noted for the definition and detail he incorporates into his superhero images. Each piece is hand-numbered and has been signed by Jim Lee.  DC Comics fans, be sure to add these Heroes to your gallery today!
